empathetic_output.support_response: We value your business and want to make things right immediately. Our team will investigate this issue promptly and work on getting the correct product delivered to you as quickly as possible. Can you please provide us with some more details such as your full name and address so we can expedite the process?
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out about my order <ORDER_ID> for <PRODUCT>, which I purchased as a birthday gift for my wife with express shipping since her birthday is in just two days. However, when I opened the box in front of my family, I was surprised and disappointed to find a coffee maker inside instead of <PRODUCT>. I would greatly appreciate it if you could look into this matter urgently and arrange for the correct item to be shipped to me as soon as possible. Could you please let me know the expected delivery time for the correct order and any additional steps I need to take?
